paragraphs: 🥺 I already miss you bubba, I wish you were here rn so we could have drinks at Raima's Birthday Bash Bar - I loved all the drinks you made for me. Best bartender ever. 🍻

🌸 I want this day and all the days after this to be full of happiness, laughter, and love. I always want to see you happy, healthy, and successful. And always remember that I love you and I'll always be there for you. 🫂

✨ Bubba I love you so much ❤️ and I want you to have these coupons which you can redeem any time, as many times as you want. And if you think of something I missed, you can add it and redeem it. This list is always yours. 🎁

💛 I already forgot about the fight. I just want to see you happy and I want us to work towards that together - lifting each other up, feeling good about ourselves, and just being in love with each other. That's all I want. 🥺
👹 Marshall says happy birthday too 🐾 and once again happy birthday bubba, Love you so so so much 💖

coupons.title: 🍽️ Dinner Date @ ECO
coupons.description: Date at ECO, with Lets Go To the ECO and Shawarma plate. 🥙

coupons.title: ☕ Coffee Date @ Starbucks
coupons.description: 🍍 cold brew / Iced Shaken Espresso / anything you want. 🧋

coupons.title: 🏠 Dinner Date @ Home
coupons.description: Shizusan sushi and coke with lemon in comfy cozy bed. 🍣🥤

coupons.title: 🛏️ Breakfast in Bed
coupons.description: You don't move. I handle everything. Breakfast comes to you. 🥞☀️

promise.title: This doesn't expire. 💫
promise.description: I'm not promising perfect. I'm promising I'll keep trying and be a better version of myself. 💪🏼 The real gift is that you can keep redeeming moments with me, today and on all the ordinary days after today. ❤️ — Akhilesh
